film.title: Khiladi 786
film.overview: A father who runs a marriage bureau believes that his son is a failure in life. In order to prove him wrong, his son takes on the task of finding a match for a gangster's sister.

dialogues.dialogue: You all lied to me. You lied to me for your son's marriage. Aren't you ashamed? You should all die of shame.  sir, calm down.
You all lied to me. You lied to me for your son's marriage. Aren't you ashamed? You should all die of shame.  sir, calm down. Calm down. Take a peek in yourself before blaming others.
And in a truck that has all the colours in the world. Don't insult the trucks. Trucks are the pride of Punjabis. Yeah, right. It's true. It's our way of living.

Father, I am not leaving. I am bringing your daughter-in-law home. - Yes, son None of our ancestors......saw their sons or grandsons getting married with pride. They'd either marry therm in the streets......or elope with the girls in taxis. Bahattar, for the first time......we'll be associated with such a honourable family.
dialogues.cause_raw: son's marriage to a respectable family
